channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Hollywood’s obsession with AI-enabled ‘perfection’ is making movies less human
item.description: The notion of authenticity in the movies has moved a step beyond the merely realistic. More and more, expensive and time-consuming fixes to minor issues of screen realism have become the work of statistical data renderings—the visual or aural products of generative artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: A.S. Hamrah, Fast Company

item.title: Google’s AI summaries are changing search. Now it’s facing a lawsuit
item.description: For more than two decades, users have turned to search engines like Google, typed in a query, and received a familiar list of 10 blue links—the gateway to the wider web. Ranking high on that list, through search engine optimization (SEO), has become a $200 billion business.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: How to get Sharp Fang in Monster Hunter Wilds
item.description: Here's where to find Sharp Fang in Monster Hunter Wilds, so that you can start crafting better armor sets and weapons.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: This tech-heavy SUV is coming to Europe –and it offers the longest all-electric range of any plug-in hybrid
item.description: An impressive new SUV from a company you probably haven't heard of is coming to Europe – meet the new Lynk & Co 08.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What is an AI server? Why artificial intelligence needs specialized systems
item.description: AI servers are advanced computing systems designed to handle complex, resource-intensive AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The iPhone 16e doesn’t have MagSafe, but apparently Apple thinks you didn’t want it anyway
item.description: The iPhone 16e is finally out, but compared to the iPhone 14 it replaces there are a few missing key features – though when it comes to MagSafe, Apple seems to think you didn’t want it in the first place.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft is finally putting Skype out of its misery, urging people to use Teams instead
item.description: Remember Skype? Microsoft does, and it is finally deciding to pull the plug on one of the first big video chat applications for PC.
item.dc:creator: alekshamcloughlin@outlook.com (Aleksha McLoughlin), TechRadar

item.title: IT leaders’ AI priorities emphasize productivity over innovation
item.description: IT leaders are still aiming for the low-hanging fruit when using AI, zeroing in on improving employee productivity rather than more advanced uses such as enabling innovation or expanding revenue, according to a new survey.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Is your mobile banking down? Lloyds, TSB, Nationwide, First Direct and Halifax issues hit thousands
item.description: Six major UK banks have reported issues with their mobile and internet banking this morning –here's the latest on a bad morning for Lloyds, TSB, First Direct, Halifax, Nationwide and Bank of Scotland customers.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: The rising threat of shadow AI
item.description: Employees in a large financial organization began developing AI tools to automate time-consuming tasks such as weekly report generation. They didn’t think about what could go wrong. Within a few months, unauthorized applications skyrocketed from just a couple to 65.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New AI Model Released: GPT-4.5 Takes Center Stage
item.description: OpenAI's latest model, GPT-4.5, is touted as its best and smartest chat model yet, with improved natural language understanding and emotional intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Stripe hits $91.5 billion valuation in latest tender offer
item.description: Stripe on Thursday announced a tender offer for employees and shareholders that valued the company at $91.5 billion, nearly 41% higher than its valuation a year ago, potentially delaying the fintech firm’s ambitions of going public.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: NFL NextGen Stats team unveils new tool to help fans better understand combine results
item.description: The NFL scouting combine provides a blizzard of data with hundreds of prospects running through various drills ranging from the 40-yard dash to the vertical jump to a short shuttle.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: StarlingX bridges IPv4-IPv6 gap with dual-stack networking support
item.description: The Open Infrastructure Foundation is out with the release of StarlingX 10.0, a significant update to the open-source distributed cloud platform designed for IoT, 5G, O-RAN and edge computing applications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: DeepSeek offers steep discounts, escalating AI price war
item.description: Chinese AI firm DeepSeek has unveiled a significant price reduction for developers using its AI models, a move that could intensify competition among both domestic and global rivals.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Vietnam plans energy shift toward building more solar, less reliance on gas and coal
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam is revising its energy plans to focus more on large solar farms and less on reliance on coal and natural gas. The fast-growing economy now aims to get 16% of its energy from the sun — more than triple its earlier target of just 5%.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Kandji exec: Vision Pro is a good fit for the enterprise
item.description: Apple’s recently announced partnership with Dassault Systemés shows the Vision Pro as the cutting-edge enterprise solution it has become, but business users will want to ensure these devices can be managed like the rest of their critical IT infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Niantic unveils Quest app to explore 3D images from around the world
item.description: Meta Quest 3 users will now be able to explore detailed 3D scans of sculptures, rock formations, plant life, and other interesting objects from around the world.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Former VA cybersecurity chief issues dire warning about data belonging to millions of veterans
item.description: Sensitive financial and health data belonging to millions of veterans and stored on a benefits website is at risk of being stolen or otherwise compromised, according to a federal employee tasked with cybersecurity who was recently fired as part of massive government-wide cuts.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Man who said he was upset with Musk and Trump charged with threatening to burn down xAI facility
item.description: ASHLAND CITY, Tenn. (AP) — A Tennessee man has been charged with an act of terrorism after he threatened to burn down an xAI facility because he was upset with its founder, Elon Musk, and President Donald Trump, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Hackers slam Michigan tribe for not negotiating after ransomware attack
item.description: A group called RansomHub has claimed responsibility for the cyberattack and submitted a letter to provide its “side of the events.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: Malware exposes 3.9 billion passwords in huge cybersecurity threat
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy offers tips on how you can protect your devices against infostealer malware, which was used to infect 4.3 million machines last year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Compute Exchange aims to disrupt AI compute access with auction-based platform
item.description: Companies looking for additional compute capacity for their AI initiatives at a price they can afford now have another option. Compute Exchange offers what it calls the world’s first auction-based exchange for AI compute resources.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: IBM targets AI application growth with DataStax buy
item.description: Looking to bolster its AI data handling and storage capabilities, IBM said it had entered an agreement to buy open-source database developer DataStax for an undisclosed amount.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Developers spend most of their time not coding – IDC report
item.description: Developers spend more time on operational and background tasks than they do on coding, according to an IDC analyst report published this month.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Top Apple exec concedes he had doubts about app store fees imposed on alternative payment options
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Longtime Apple executive Phil Schiller on Monday conceded he initially opposed fees that the iPhone maker charges for in app-transactions processed outside its own payment system because he feared violating a court-ordered mandate designed to create more competition.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Apple announces $500 billion investment in US amid tariff threats that could affect the iPhone
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Apple announced Monday that it plans to invest more than $500 billion in the United States over the next four years, including plans to hire 20,000 people and build a new server factory in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Massive airship could shake up cargo transport
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says this enormous airship revolutionizes cargo transport by flying to remote areas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brazil Supreme Court justice orders Rumble suspension nationwide for alleged non-compliance
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — A Brazilian Supreme Court justice on Friday ordered the suspension of video-sharing platform Rumble in the South American nation for allegedly refusing to comply with court orders.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sweden is investigating a damaged cable in the Baltic Sea
item.description: STOCKHOLM (AP) — Swedish authorities said on Friday they were investigating a damaged cable that was discovered in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a string of recent incidents of ruptured undersea cables that have heightened fears of Russian sabotage and spying in the region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Apple drops encryption feature for UK users after government reportedly demanded backdoor access
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple said Friday it will stop offering an advanced data security option for British users after the government reportedly demanded that the company provide backdoor access for any data those users have stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4
